scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/lib run sync && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n core,docs -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run dev" "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-docs run dev"
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-e2e run test
scripts.test:quick: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-e2e run test:quick
scripts.test:lib: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/lib run test
scripts.test:ci: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run eslint:txt && nx run-many -t test --projects=reference-core,@reference-ui/reference-unit --parallel=2 --outputStyle=stream --skipNxCache && nx run @reference-ui/reference-e2e:quick --outputStyle=stream --skipNxCache
scripts.test:system: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run eslint:txt && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n core,app -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run test" "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-unit run test"
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n core,app -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run test" "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-unit run test" && REF_TEST_FRESH=1 pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-e2e run test:quick
